title: BEM-829 verify dispatch result
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:33 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
results=[]
rd=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
if rd.exists():
    for p in sorted(rd.glob('*.status.json')):
        results.append({'path':str(p),'text':read(p)[:1200]})
marker=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
queue=[str(p) for p in sorted(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').glob('*.json'))] if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue').exists() else []
if results:
    status='dispatch_results_present_after_json_fix'
    next_action='parse latest dispatch result and then verify Claude runtime'
elif marker.get('status'):
    status='processor_started_but_no_dispatch_results'
    next_action='inspect queue and processor write path'
else:
    status='processor_marker_missing_after_json_fix'
    next_action='inspect codex-runner queue processor placement'
state={'bem':'BEM-829','status':status,'result_count':len(results),'results':results[-10:],'marker':marker,'queue_remaining':queue[-20:],'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem829_verify_dispatch_after_json_fix.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem829_verify_dispatch_after_json_fix.md').write_text('# BEM-829 | Verify Dispatch After JSON Fix | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem829_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-829'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem829_verify_dispatch_after_json_fix.json','governance/reports/bem829_verify_dispatch_after_json_fix.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem829_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified workflow dispatch results, queue marker, remaining queue files, and Claude runtime after malformed JSON fix')
